evals.expected_output: Calls the /rp-server-b2c/ seed and list-bills endpoints, picks the most recent bill, downloads the PDF via the /care/v1/.../pdf endpoint, saves to ~/Desktop/ with filename Three_UK_Bill_<Month>_<Year>_GBP<Amount>.pdf, verifies contents, reports summary

evals.prompt: Can you grab my March 2026 Three UK mobile bill and save it to ~/Documents/bills/
evals.expected_output: Maps month=March year=2026 to the matching billNumber from the list-bills response, downloads the PDF to ~/Documents/bills/ with correct filename, verifies the bill date and amount on the PDF match March 2026

evals.prompt: Download my Three phone bill for January 2020
evals.expected_output: Finds no matching {month, year} in the list-bills response, surfaces the available months from the API, asks the user to pick one. Does not write any file.
